subject: [PATCH v5 12/21] swap: implement the swap_cgroup API using virtual swap

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch updates the swap_cgroup API to use virtual swap, allowing for dynamic allocation of memory for swap entries' cgroup information. This reduces memory overhead in large but sparsely used swap spaces by only allocating memory when needed. The change involves moving the swap entry's cgroup information from a static array to the swap descriptor and updating various functions that interact with the swap_cgroup API.
